summary: Step 5 bug fixes fully verified: Virtual reviews (Voci del Pubblico) now returns 33 reviews from virtual_reviews collection, Cinema Journal response reduced from 78MB to under 2MB, Cinema News reduced from 27MB to under 100KB, catchup/process datetime error fixed, Major Studios page working correctly.

issues: Some test films have broken/missing poster images (showing 'TEST_BugFix51_...' text instead of images) - these are test data artifacts, not a bug

critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/journal/virtual-reviews now correctly queries the virtual_reviews collection (line 4964) instead of looking for films.virtual_reviews field
GET /api/films/cinema-journal excludes poster_url and attendance_history from main film list (line 4666) - reduces 78MB to <2MB
POST /api/catchup/process has proper tzinfo check (lines 13110-13111) - fixes offset-naive vs offset-aware datetime error
GET /api/major/my returns has_major, level, bonuses, members, activities correctly

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Cinema Journal loads, Voci dal Pubblico dialog shows 33 reviews, Major page displays correctly)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All Step 5 fixes verified working. Key optimizations: 1) Virtual reviews come from virtual_reviews collection (not embedded in films), 2) Large fields (poster_url base64, avatar_url, attendance_history) excluded from list endpoints, 3) datetime objects properly handle timezone info in catchup system.

GET /api/journal/virtual-reviews.details: Returns 33+ reviews from virtual_reviews collection (was 0 before fix)

GET /api/films/cinema-journal recent_pos.details: Returns minimal poster data (id, title, poster_url, virtual_likes, likes_count)

GET /api/cinema-news response size.details: Response under 100KB (was 27MB before fix due to discoverer_avatar)

POST /api/catchup/process datetime fix.details: No 500 error - datetime offset handling fixed

GET /api/major/my.details: Returns has_major=true with major details for user in Studio's World

Frontend Pubblico dialog (Voci dal Pubbl.details: Dialog opens and shows 33 virtual reviews with reviewer names, ratings, comments

Frontend Major page.details: Shows Studio's World major with Livello 1, bonuses (+2% Qualità, +5% Incassi, +5% XP), activities
